[]: Re: Why Asuka is trash waifu Post by FelipeFritschF » Sat Feb 12, 2022 10:15 pm I'd say Asuka is simply polarizing. You love or hate her. But the same applies for Rei, Kaworu and Shinji. I'd say most people like Misato and Mari has a lot of people that are simply indifferent to her, so not as polarizing. Still, Asuka was the most popular in 2020: thread/20120/NHKs-Evangelion-mega-poll-results-2020/ Favorite Character Asuka Shikinami Langley Kaworu Nagisa Rei Ayanami Shinji Ikari Misato Katsuragi Mari Makinami Illustrious Kaji Ruoji Pen-Pen Maya Ibuki Gendo Ikari Ritsuko Akagi Kozo Fuyutsuki Toji Suzuhara Yui Ikari Hikari Horaki Shigeru Aoba Sakura Suzuhara Shiro Tokita Makoto Hyuga Kensuke Aida
